item.title: 台湾基金资产规模预计将升至30万亿新台币：业界高管
item.description: 台湾投资基金业正处于激进扩张的临界点，该行业协会主席近日接受采访时表示，预计未来三年内，境内外资产管理规模（AUM）将激增至30万亿新台币（约合9680亿美元）。【原文：Taiwan’s investment fund industry is on ​the verge of ‌an aggressive expansion, with total onshore and offshore assets ​under management (AUM) expected ​to surge to T$30 trillion ($968 ⁠billion) within the ​next three years, the ​chairman of Taiwan's investment fund industry association said in a ​recent interview.】

item.title: 三星显示首席执行官警告中东冲突将推高成本，媒体报道称
item.description: 三星显示公司首席执行官周四表示，中东战争可能推高手机及其他电子设备所用平板显示屏所需的能源和原材料成本，媒体报道称。【原文：Samsung ​Display's chief ‌executive said on Thursday ​the ​war in the ⁠Middle ​East threatens ​to drive up costs of ​energy ​and raw materials ‌needed ⁠for the flat screens ​used ​in ⁠mobile phones and ​other ​electronic ⁠devices, media reported.】

item.title: 美元徘徊于2026年高点附近，油价上涨推动市场押注央行将采取鹰派政策
item.description: 周四，避险美元汇率徘徊在年内高位附近，因油价攀升可能推高通胀，迫使全球央行采取更强硬的政策立场。【原文：The safe-haven U.S. dollar hovered close to its strongest levels this year on Thursday as climbing oil prices threatened to spur inflation ​and force central banks globally to adopt more hawkish policy stances.】

item.title: 《宝可梦：隐形》的热销助推任天堂Switch 2势头看涨
item.description: 任天堂周四表示，自发售以来四天内，《宝可梦 梦工厂》销量已突破220万份。该游戏的热销势头缓解了市场对Switch 2销售动能的担忧。【原文：Nintendo said on Thursday it has sold more than 2.2 ​million copies of "Pokemon Pokopia" in ‌the four days since launch as the game's popularity helps offset fear about Switch ​2 sales momentum.】

item.title: 中东战火蔓延，伊拉克水域油轮遭袭，油价应声上涨
item.description: 周四油价攀升，此前伊拉克安全官员称，伊朗装载爆炸物的船只袭击了两艘燃料油油轮，而美以对伊朗的战争也导致全球供应中断。【原文：Oil prices climbed on Thursday after Iraqi security officials said Iranian explosive-laden boats had hit two fuel oil ​tankers amid other global supply disruptions from the U.S.-Israeli war on ‌Iran.】

item.title: 日产、优步、Wayve宣布建立自动驾驶出租车合作
item.description: 日产汽车、优步科技和英国初创企业Wayve周四宣布，将合作开发无人驾驶出租车。【原文：Nissan Motor , Uber ​Technologies and ‌British startup Wayve said on ​Thursday they ​will collaborate on ⁠the development ​of robotaxis.】

item.title: 股价暴跌，油价再度飙升，伊朗袭击海湾航运
item.description: 周四亚洲股市下跌，因有报道称霍尔木兹海峡和伊拉克水域又有船只遭袭，油价因此飙升，推高了全球通胀压力并推升借贷成本。【原文：Shares fell in ​Asia on Thursday as oil prices jumped on reports that more ships had been struck in the Strait of Hormuz and ‌in Iraqi waters, fuelling inflation and pushing borrowing costs higher worldwide.】

item.title: 乔比航空首款量产电动空中出租车成功首飞
item.description: 乔比航空周三宣布，其首架飞机已开始进行飞行测试，该测试将由联邦监管机构监督，旨在获取型号检查授权（TIA）。这是飞机获得商业运营认证的重要里程碑。【原文：Joby Aviation said on Wednesday it has started flying its first aircraft that will undergo ​certification testing with federal regulators to receive type inspection ‌authorization (TIA), a major milestone toward an aircraft's certification for commercial operations.】

item.title: 英国监管机构敦促Meta、TikTok、Snap和YouTube平台屏蔽儿童内容
item.description: 英国媒体和隐私监管机构周四要求各大社交媒体平台加强措施，防止儿童使用其服务，并警告称这些公司未能执行自身制定的最低年龄限制规则。【原文：Britain's media and privacy regulators on Thursday demanded that major social media platforms do more to keep children ​off their services, warning that companies were failing to enforce ‌their own minimum age rules.】

item.title: 美国将从战略石油储备中释放1.72亿桶原油
item.description: 美国能源部长克里斯·赖特周三表示，美国将从战略石油储备中释放1.72亿桶石油，以期抑制因美以对伊战争引发的供应冲击而飙升的油价。【原文：The U.S. will ​release 172 million barrels of oil from its strategic ‌petroleum reserve in a bid to reduce oil prices that have soared due to supply shocks from the U.S.-Israeli war on ​Iran, U.S. Energy Secretary Chris Wright said on ​Wednesday.】

item.title: 摩根士丹利限制私募信贷基金赎回，因资金撤离激增
item.description: 监管文件周三显示，华尔街银行巨头摩根士丹利已对其旗下某私募信贷基金实施赎回限制，此前投资者试图赎回该基金近11%的流通份额。【原文：Wall Street banking giant Morgan Stanley has limited redemptions at one of its private credit funds after investors sought to withdraw almost 11% of shares outstanding, a ​regulatory filing showed on Wednesday.】

item.title: 特朗普"301条款"调查涉及的16个美国贸易伙伴
item.description: 美国周三宣布，将对16个主要贸易伙伴启动不公平贸易行为调查。此举是特朗普政府为恢复关税而采取的紧急举措之一，此前美国最高法院裁定这些关税措施违法。【原文：The United States on Wednesday said it was launching ​unfair trade practice investigations into 16 ‌key trading partners, part of an urgent effort by President Donald Trump's ​administration to restore tariffs recently struck ​down by the U.S. Supreme ⁠Court as illegal.】

item.title: 美国启动新一轮反倾销调查以重建特朗普的关税压力
item.description: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普政府周三对16个主要贸易伙伴的过剩工业产能启动新一轮贸易调查，此举旨在重建关税压力——此前美国最高法院上月推翻了特朗普关税计划的核心内容。【原文：U.S. President Donald Trump's administration on Wednesday launched a new trade investigation into excess industrial capacity in 16 major trading partners in a move ​to rebuild tariff pressure after the U.S. Supreme Court tore down the centerpiece of Trump's tariff program last month.】

item.title: 在监管鼓励下，中国企业竞相对冲人民币汇率波动风险
item.description: 随着人民币持续升值数月来冲击部分出口企业，加之近期伊朗局势加剧市场波动，中国企业纷纷涌向衍生品市场规避汇率风险。【原文：Chinese companies have rushed to derivatives for protection from currency exposure as a rising yuan has hurt some exporters for months and - more recently - the war in Iran has ramped up volatility.】

item.title: 五角大楼备忘录称，将允许在6个月过渡期后继续使用Anthropic技术
item.description: 据路透社获得的一份内部备忘录显示，五角大楼已告知其高级领导层，若被认定对国家安全至关重要，Anthropic公司的人工智能工具使用期限可延长至此前宣布的六个月过渡期之后。【原文：The Pentagon has told its senior leaders that use of Anthropic's AI tools may continue beyond a previously announced six-month phase-out period ​if deemed critical to national security, according to an internal memo ‌seen by Reuters.】

item.title: 伊朗石油仍经霍尔木兹海峡运输，尽管海湾邻国出口已中断
item.description: 路透社对油轮追踪数据的分析显示，尽管德黑兰关联势力在霍尔木兹海峡对船只发动的袭击已重创其他海湾国家的原油出口，伊朗原油仍以接近正常的速度持续通过该海峡运输。【原文：Iranian crude oil has continued to flow through the Strait of Hormuz ​at a near-normal pace even as Tehran-linked attacks on ships in the narrow waterway have decimated exports from other Gulf countries, a Reuters ‌review of tanker tracking data showed.】

item.title: 美国总统在战争期间如何动用战略石油储备？
item.description: 美国计划从战略石油储备中释放1.72亿桶原油，占其与盟国协调释放总量逾40%，以缓解因美以对伊战争导致的供应中断引发的油价飙升。【原文：The U.S. plans to release 172 million barrels of oil from its Strategic Petroleum Reserve, more than 40% of a wider release ​coordinated with allies, to help dampen prices spiked by supply disruptions from the U.S.-Israeli ‌war on Iran.】

item.title: 独家：知情人士称软银旗下PayPay定价低于预期区间，每股16美元
item.description: 知情人士称，软银集团旗下的PayPay周三将其美国首次公开募股定价为每股16美元，低于目标价格区间。美以两国对伊朗的战争给市场带来压力。【原文：SoftBank Group-backed PayPay priced its U.S. initial public offering at $16 per share on Wednesday, below its targeted price range, people familiar with the matter said, as the ​U.S.-Israeli war on Iran weighed on markets.】

item.title: 文件显示，甲骨文在TikTok美国合资企业中的股权价值约为20亿美元。
item.description: 周三提交的文件显示，甲骨文在TikTok美国业务中的股权价值约为20亿美元。此前一个多月，TikTok中国母公司字节跳动已敲定协议，将成立一家由其控股的美国合资企业以规避禁令。【原文：Oracle's stake in TikTok's U.S. business operations is worth around $2 billion, a filing showed on Wednesday, ​more than a month after its Chinese ‌parent ByteDance finalized a deal to set up a majority-owned American joint venture to avoid a ban.】

item.title: 好市多顾客起诉要求分摊特朗普关税的退款
item.description: 好市多批发公司周三被提起一项拟议的全国性集体诉讼，要求该公司向美国消费者退还此前收取的溢价。此前美国最高法院已推翻了特朗普总统实施的进口关税。【原文：Costco Wholesale was sued on Wednesday in a proposed nationwide class action seeking U.S. customer refunds for ​higher prices charged by the company before the U.S. Supreme Court ‌struck down import tariffs imposed by President Donald Trump.】

item.title: Atlassian将裁员约1600人，转向人工智能领域
item.description: 软件供应商Atlassian周三宣布，将裁减约10%的员工，即约1600个岗位，作为推进人工智能和企业销售业务重组计划的一部分。【原文：Software provider Atlassian said on Wednesday ​it would lay off ‌around 10% of its workforce, or roughly 1,600 positions, as part ​of a restructuring ​plan to push into ⁠artificial intelligence and enterprise ​sales.】

item.title: 交易日：油价与收益率一路飙升
item.description: 周三油价大幅攀升，尽管全球原油储备创纪录地释放，这加剧了通胀担忧，并推动两年期国债收益率升至9月以来最高水平。股市承受的压力过大，华尔街多数股指收跌。【原文：Oil prices rose sharply on Wednesday despite a record release of global crude reserves, stoking inflation fears and lifting two-year Treasury yields to the highest since September. The weight on stocks was too much, and Wall Street ended mostly lower.】

item.title: 五角大楼为"经济防御部门"招揽高盛、摩根大通银行家，据Semafor报道
item.description: 据Semafor周三报道，五角大楼正组建一支精通私募股权的新投资银行团队，计划在三年内向国防交易投入2000亿美元。该报道援引了其查阅的一份文件。【原文：The Pentagon is building a new team of investment bankers steeped in private equity to ​invest $200 billion over three years in defense deals, Semafor ‌reported on Wednesday, citing a document it had reviewed.】

item.title: 人类学五边形组织在人工智能安全保障问题上的争端如何升级
item.description: 今年1月，美国国防部与Anthropic公司爆发对峙，起因是这家人工智能实验室拒绝放松其系统安全防护措施，导致五角大楼将其列为"供应链风险"，使该公司的政府合同面临风险。【原文：A standoff erupted between the U.S. Department of Defense and Anthropic in January after the AI lab refused to loosen safety guardrails on its systems, prompting the Pentagon to label it a 'supply-chain risk,' and putting the company's government contracts in jeopardy.】

item.title: Bumble季度营收超出预期
item.description: Bumble周三公布的第四季度营收超出预期，这家约会应用运营商开始从全面转型计划中获得初步成效，其股价在盘后交易中上涨约12%。【原文：Bumble on Wednesday posted ​fourth-quarter revenue above estimates, ‌as the dating app operator began to see early benefits ​from a broad turnaround ​plan, sending its shares up about ⁠12% in extended trading.】

item.title: 亿万富翁卡齐马蒂迪斯表示，加油站的痛苦将在一两个月内缓解
item.description: 宾夕法尼亚州一家炼油厂和纽约多家连锁超市的亿万富翁老板约翰·卡茨马蒂迪斯周二接受路透社采访时表示，消费者将在一两个月内从加油站快速上涨的油价中获得缓解。【原文：Consumers will get relief from the rapid ​increases in fuel prices at the pumps in a month or ‌two, John Catsimatidis, the billionaire owner of a Pennsylvania refinery and New York supermarket chains, told Reuters in an interview on Tuesday.】

item.title: 葡萄牙警告外国国家支持的黑客正瞄准官员和军方通讯账户
item.description: 英国国家安全局（SIS）周三警告称，外国政府支持的黑客已发起全球网络攻击行动，试图入侵政府官员、外交官和军事人员的WhatsApp及Signal通讯账户。【原文：Foreign state-backed hackers have launched a global cyber campaign to access the ​WhatsApp and Signal accounts of government officials, ‌diplomats and military personnel, the national intelligence service (SIS) warned on Wednesday.】

item.title: 据《华尔街日报》报道，蒂尔曼·费尔蒂塔正洽谈以70亿美元收购凯撒娱乐公司。
item.description: 据《华尔街日报》周三援引知情人士报道，亿万富翁蒂尔曼·费尔蒂塔以约70亿美元的价格收购凯撒娱乐公司进入独家谈判阶段，此前他提出的报价超越了亿万富翁投资者卡尔·伊坎旗下公司的竞购方案。【原文：Billionaire Tilman Fertitta has been in exclusive ​talks to buy Caesars Entertainment ​for roughly $7 billion after he ⁠topped a competing offer ​from billionaire investor Carl Icahn's firm, ​the Wall Street Journal reported on Wednesday, citing people familiar with the ​matter.】

item.title: 据彭博社报道，特朗普将援引紧急状态法支持加州石油生产商Sable
item.description: 据彭博社周三报道，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普计划援引紧急状态法，以支持萨博尔海上公司重启加州一组海上平台的石油生产。该报道援引知情人士消息称。【原文：U.S. President Donald Trump plans to invoke emergency law for ​Sable Offshore as it looks to restart ‌production from a cluster of offshore platforms in California, Bloomberg News reported on Wednesday, citing a person ​familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 西班牙移动通信基站运营商Cellnex预计行业整合步伐将放缓
item.description: 欧洲最大移动通信基站运营商Cellnex的首席执行官表示，中东冲突引发的市场动荡意味着该行业的整合进程将不会如他此前预期般迅速推进。【原文：The chief executive of Cellnex , Europe's largest mobile phone tower operator, said volatile markets in the ‌wake of the Middle East conflict meant consolidation in the sector would not happen as quickly as he had previously expected.】
